cards.name: Lightning Strike
cards.text: Lightning Strike deals 3 damage to any target.

cards.name: Soul-Scar Mage
cards.text:
Prowess
If a source you control would deal noncombat damage to a creature an opponent controls, put that many -1/-1 counters on that creature instead.

cards.name: Eidolon of the Great Revel
cards.text: Whenever a player casts a spell with mana value 3 or less, this creature deals 2 damage to that player.

cards.name: Kumano Faces Kakkazan // Etching of Kumano
cards.text:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter.)
I — This Saga deals 1 damage to each opponent and each planeswalker they control.
II — When you next cast a creature spell this turn, that creature enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it.
III — Exile this Saga, then return it to the battlefield transformed under your control.

cards.text:

Prowess (Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, this creature gets +1/+1 until end of turn.)

cards.name: Magebane Lizard
cards.text: Whenever a player casts a noncreature spell, this creature deals damage to that player equal to the number of noncreature spells they've cast this turn.

cards.name: Screaming Nemesis
cards.text:
Haste
Whenever this creature is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to any other target. If a player is dealt damage this way, they can't gain life for the rest of the game.

cards.name: Sunspine Lynx
cards.text:
Players can't gain life.
Damage can't be prevented.
When this creature enters, it deals damage to each player equal to the number of nonbasic lands that player controls.

cards.name: Den of the Bugbear

{3}{R}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a 3/2 red Goblin creature with "Whenever this creature attacks, create a 1/1 red Goblin creature token that's tapped and attacking." It's still a land.
